query: I'm kicking off a CX transformation project for a mid-sized Australian bank and need to build a picture of the external forces shaping customer expectations before I start the discovery phase. Can you help me scan the macro environment?

we've got a board workshop in 3 weeks for a health insurance client and i need to build out the strategic context slide — what are the big forces in the health sector right now that are affecting how customers experience their insurer?

I'm writing the brief for a CX strategy project in retail banking and want to understand what technology shifts in the next 3-5 years will most affect how customers interact with their bank. Things like AI, open banking, that kind of stuff.

My client is a telco and they keep saying their CX problems are unique to them, but I think a lot of what they're experiencing is driven by broader forces — customer trust erosion, digital channel expectations, stuff like that. Can you do a trend scan to help me make that argument?

building a client deck for an energy company — section 2 needs to cover the external environment affecting their customer experience. want a PESTLE-style analysis focused on what matters for CX specifically, not generic strategy stuff

I need to brief a design team on the macro context before they start journey mapping for a superannuation fund. What are the key external forces — regulatory, social, tech — that should be shaping how we think about the member experience?

we uploaded a gartner report and a deloitte customer trends report from last year — can you read them and pull out the most relevant signals for our CX work with a logistics company? we want a trend radar, not just a summary

i want to understand which technology waves are actually going to land in the 2-4 year window for retail — specifically the ones that will change customer behaviour at the point of purchase or post-purchase service. AI, IoT, whatever is real versus hype

we're in a competitive pitch for a CX program at an aged care provider and I want our proposal to show we understand the macro context — social, regulatory, demographic shifts — that make this work urgent now not in 5 years
can you help me understand what's happening with AI and customer service automation and whether banks should be investing in it
I need to analyse this company's NPS trend data and understand why their scores have been declining over the last 18 months
who are the main competitors in the Australian health insurance market and what are they doing differently from our client
can you help me run a SWOT analysis for my client? they want to understand their strengths, weaknesses, opportunities and threats before we scope the project
I want to map the customer journey for someone applying for a home loan at a bank — from awareness through to settlement
what are the biggest regulatory changes affecting financial services in australia right now — i need to make sure our compliance team is across them
I need to do a competitor benchmarking exercise — can you help me compare our client's digital experience against the top 3 players in their market?
i've got a bunch of customer interview transcripts from a discovery phase — can you help me identify themes and patterns in what customers are telling us?
what are the current trends in CX? i need some thought leadership content for a linkedin post
can you read this analyst report and give me a summary of the key points
my client wants to know what's happening with the economy and whether they should delay their CX investment — help me build the business case for why now is still the right time
